meaning: vt.咀爵(食物等)v.咀嚼,认真考虑
examples: I do not chew gum in public.
After the operation you may find it difficult to chew and swallow.
Don't chew, break, or crush the tablet.
The first stage was 117km based on a 13km circuit around Chew Valley Lake.
Many have teeth stained from cigarettes they smoke and tobacco they chew to relieve the tedium.
